name: blocker-ac-tick-cadence
purpose: Per-tick orch cadence wrapper for blocker-discipline.md AC re-evaluation. Increments per-repo tick counter; for each open blocker JSON at .flywheel/state/blockers/*.json with last_verified_at stale (>24h), invokes flywheel_replay_verify --blocker-ac every Nth tick (default N=4 per doctrine). No-ops gracefully when no blockers exist. Wire-in source: flywheel-e4ulf.
